chunks.text: MFI Thorax Fabrication March 2001 Mockup model of MFI at 1X scale, showing construction techniques of hollow stainless steel beams. This model is inert, and does not have actuators, joints, or wing hinge, but it shows what the MFI may look like. Marc

nge, but it shows what the MFI may look like. March 2000 Laser cut stainless steel, and folded 4 bar for MFI thorax. Cut using Microlaze software written by Jeff Thompson. Mass of 4 bar is about 6 mg. Mar. 2000 Back to MFI Homepage
